---
title: "The Railroad Children - Charlotte Mary Yonge"
sort_title: "Railroad Children - Charlotte Mary Yonge"
year: 1849
slug: "railroad children"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---


*1849*



###   
**Online text of The Railroad Children**

[Click here to read a facsimile scan of The The railroad children](http://books.google.com/books?vid=0jcE7MpXliLfJhhU&id=qU4DAAAAQAAJ&pg=PA1&lpg=PA1&dq=charlotte%2Byonge&as_brr=1#PPP8,M1).  
(Google scan of a Bodleian copy)
